name: MOON SHINOBI

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Ω Feint
abilities.text: After an enemy model fails a (magic) action targeting this model, deal 1 damage to the enemy.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Crooked Crane
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action treats all (minus) as (plus). Target gains a Poison token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Drunken Dash
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5", ignoring models and terrain. Models moved through this way gain a Poison token.

triggers.name: Eyes Peeled
triggers.text: If this model is at elevation 2 or higher, it declares the Prepare action.

actions.name: A Shot of Genius
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. Target gains either a Poison or an Insight token.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
